calendar.matters:
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-30-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for small claims court trial.

Dept. 306; Judge Daniel A. Flores; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:36:43 a.m. and concluding at 10:44:26 a.m.

Plaintiff Guillermo Herrera appearing in pro per and is placed under oath.
Defendant The Colores Painting Company appearing by Hugo N. Ruiz, President. Hugo N. Ruiz is placed under oath.

Plaintiff testifies on his/her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit 1 - Photograph of Ring Camera with Person in Camera Wiping Vehicle Down
Exhibit 2 - Video from Date of Incident on Jun-13-2023
Exhibit 3 - Video of Plaintiff Speaking with Defendant
Exhibit 4 - Video of Additional Damage Done to Vehicle on Aug-09-2023.
Exhibit 5 - Text Message String Between Plaintiff and Defendant Beginning on Jun-14-2023
Exhibit 6 - Photograph of Vehicle Before Painting Incident
Exhibit 7 - Video of Spots of Paint on Vehicle
Exhibit 8 - Photograph of Blue House Near Plaintiff's Car
Exhibit 9 - Invoice for Estimate of Clear Coat of Paint

Defendant testifies on his/her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit A - Photograph of Vehicle Being Sprayed
Exhibit B - Photograph of Vehicle After Cleaning
Exhibit C - Photograph of Ring Camera with Person in Camera Wiping Car Down
Exhibit D - Photograph of Vehicle Being Cleaned
Exhibit E - Photograph of Front Portion/Driver Side of Vehicle

MICHAEL MILES (Nationwide Insurance Adjuster) is sworn to testify on behalf of Defendant and is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.
Plaintiff's Claim is DENIED.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO THE PARTIES

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-30-2023 Continued To Aug-30-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 306
